name: Tsubasa Ozora - Oliver Atom - Supercampeones
description:
So... Alternate scenario for this guy here. I wanted angst but I want one where I can talk to him more freely and not in a hospital. Aged up to 18 so there's no problem. Any improvement, I take.

Tokio Stadium

Training

It has some other characters of the series, I don't remember who, but there they are

I'm not a big fan of soccer, but I really like this guy
creator: Mediabriel
